description_long: This is a low-top sneaker featuring a classic black-and-white checkerboard canvas upper, characteristic of skate and streetwear culture. The shoe has a white rubber sole with a slightly textured sidewall and a visible foxing stripe. The interior appears to be lined with a light brown fabric, and the collar shows signs of wear and fraying. The lacing system consists of white eyelets and missing laces, with the tongue and eyelet area showing significant wear. A small branded tag is visible on the side, and a red rectangular logo patch is present on the heel. The overall appearance suggests frequent use, with visible dirt and creasing throughout.
description: A black-and-white checkerboard canvas sneaker with a white rubber sole, visible wear, and missing laces. The shoe features a branded side tag and a red logo patch on the heel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the checkerboard pattern, branded side tag, and white rubber sole.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the red rectangular logo patch and heel wear.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with visible creasing and worn canvas.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the missing laces, worn tongue, and checkerboard toe area.
attribute_logo: Red rectangular logo patch on the heel, small blue side tag
